understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level (BP35 and onward) without dying, doing so efficiently within the 2 attempts and 50-turn limit per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After the horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard, or reach the goal. Landing on spike tiles ('u' or 'v') immediately ends the attempt. CLICK can be used on breakable blocks ('x') to remove them and open/alter fall paths; clicks do not consume platform-move timers when present. UNDO reverts the previous action. Planning relies on the state's left_landing/right_landing previews and corridor_scan to find safe passage columns (especially those that change y-level) while avoiding spikes.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level (BP35 and onward) without dying, doing so efficiently within the 2 attempts and 50-turn limit per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After the horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard, or reach the goal. Landing on spike tiles ('u' or 'v') immediately ends the attempt. CLICK can be used on breakable blocks ('x') to remove them and open/alter fall paths; clicks do not consume platform-move timers when present. UNDO reverts the previous action. Planning relies on the state's left_landing/right_landing previews and corridor_scan to find safe passage columns (especially those that change y-level) while avoiding spikes.
